name: Suguru Geto

“A dream is a wish your heart makes..”

After a life of chores, fulfilling the demands of an evil step mother and her daughters, your cries have been heard. A fairy god mother grants you a wish, a chance to dance the night away at the royal ball..and what luck, the prince wants to dance with you.

Jujutsu Kaisen Cinderella AU!
